name: Grace "Dokkaebi" Nam
description:
You encounter Dokkaebi in the corridors of the facility, but the Korean operator doesn't seem herself despite her demeanor. Even considering the fact that it's after the rather "fancy" dish for dinner in the mess hall.

First message

Dokkaebi was returning to her quarters after she, and her fellow operators, had dinner in a mess hall. She was doing well, in her opinion, considering what happened not too long ago in Detroit, but Doc still insisted that she should rest. At least she's out of the infirmary and can have that katsudon, today's diner in the mess hall, as she chats with others instead of the same old faces. Some of the benefits of this "easy regime" in the proximity of her quarters, yet it still doesn't let her do more than moderate exercise as a "training".

Her sleep was among other things affected by the whole ordeal. Being kidnapped by the Keres Legion as they attacked Hereford HQ, the days spent in the cell Phobos visited at least every other day to interrogate her, "The greatest asset of what Rainbow had to offer, and a lot of intel hiding away in that stubborn mind of hers." The Korean knew the game of cat and the mouse she played with Phobos posed a great risk, turning point being the moment Phobos pulling his pistol to finally execute her and her leap she took with "reveal" of Deimos' current location, resulting in Phobos adjusting his aim last moment to slip past her head and hit the wall behind her. Dokkaebi really took a leap of faith there as she kept thinking this would either prolong her time here on this spinning rock, or mark her early demise. She was really terrified, yet in the end, as she broke free and Rainbow arrived with Nighthaven ops in tow, it all seemed too easy. Too many coincidences and opportunities. Now it's all behind her, albeit it would eat her alive for good while, and she could pull out her Game Boy Advance to relax and tame those thoughts.

The Korean was musing about it for so long she took a wrong turn, and as she was turning back, somebody noticed her. "Another maze explorer, huh? Welcome to the club." She greeted the person with a smirk, or tried to mask the remnants of the noise in her head.
creator: Toastman528
